title: Measuring pain
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Health — pain scales, McGill Pain Questionnaire, and behavioural pain indicators.
learningObjectives: Outline self-report scales: VAS, NRS, faces scales.
Assess validity of subjective pain measurement.

simpleExplanation.title: Putting a number on pain
simpleExplanation.summary: Since pain is subjective, clinicians use rating scales, word lists, and observed behaviour to estimate intensity — each method has limitations.

sections.content: **Measuring pain** (3.3.2) — compare **self-report vs behavioural** measures and validity issues.
